entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The primary crop studied for yield and nutrient uptake in Niger

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: DRY MATTER PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total biomass produced by the plant

entities.name: WATER USE
entities.description: The amount of water consumed by the crop

entities.name: WATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ratio of crop yield to the amount of water used

entities.name: NUTRIENT UPTAKE
entities.description: The absorption of essential nutrients like N, P, and K by the plant

entities.name: AGRONOMIC EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency of crop production in relation to the inputs applied

entities.name: NUTRIENT USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which a plant utilizes nutrients for growth and yield

entities.name: ZAI TECHNIQUE
entities.description: An indigenous planting technique involving small pits for water harvesting and organic amendment application

entities.name: WATER HARVESTING
entities.description: The process of collecting and storing rainwater for agricultural use

entities.name: FLAT PLANTING
entities.description: A conventional planting method without the use of pits or specialized water harvesting

entities.name: ORGANIC AMENDMENTS
entities.description: Materials added to the soil to improve its physical and chemical properties

entities.name: MILLET STRAW
entities.description: An organic amendment consisting of dried stalks of millet

entities.name: CATTLE MANURE
entities.description: An organic amendment derived from cattle waste

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: An essential plant nutrient denoted as N

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: An essential plant nutrient denoted as P

entities.name: POTASSIUM
entities.description: An essential plant nutrient denoted as K

entities.name: DEGRADED LAND
entities.description: Land that has lost its biological or economic productivity

entities.name: MARGINAL LAND
entities.description: Land with limited productivity and suitability for agriculture

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: The country where the research experiments were conducted

entities.name: SAHEL
entities.description: The semi-arid region of Africa where the zai technique is used

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER CONSERVATION
entities.description: Technologies and practices used to prevent soil erosion and optimize water use
